market: 8 priority filings from the watchlist were upgraded from inventory blurbs into plain-English filing-read notes.
tech: Primary SEC filings were read where accessible; RDW was substantially read, while several others remain partial-read due to SEC exhibit extraction limits in this environment.
risk: Use the report for investor context, but verify partially-read 8-K exhibit details before making a high-conviction trade decision.
title: Atlas Filings Report — 2026-03-10
summary: Layman filing-read upgrade focused on ONDS, NVDA, AVGO, BBAI, RDW, RKLB, PLTR, and COHR. RDW was the clearest fully readable filing: growth improved with Edge Autonomy but margin quality, impairments, and control weaknesses remain major concerns. Other names were upgraded into plain-English investor notes with explicit partial-read caveats where SEC exhibit extraction was incomplete.
